name: transportation logistics managers processing 5–15 vehicle maintenance logs/month tool
description: For transportation logistics managers processing 5–15 vehicle maintenance logs/month, inconsistent tracking causes potential breakdowns. We provide a dedicated tool instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.

problem_solved: Inconsistent vehicle maintenance tracking leading to potential breakdowns.
features: manual entry for vehicle maintenance logs
simple reporting dashboard for maintenance history
